may.name: Account Transfer to
may.desc_info:
Dear Players, thank you for your continued support. We regret to inform you that the platform is deemed potentially at risk of closure. In order to prevent another mess of late transfer, players who wish to migrate/transfer to GTA can do so ahead of time.
There will be two channels available for you to provide your account transfer information:
Forum Post: We have already published a thread on the forum, please refer to it for more details(Click the image on the right to go to the post)
Message Board: We will be opening the message board feature to all Kabam players as soon as possible, allowing you to provide your transfer details directly to our official staff.
